directives_for_next_cycle.directive: DO NOT START CYCLE 3 until human resolves domain ERROR issues
directives_for_next_cycle.rationale: 3/5 domains failing with undiagnosed errors. Continuing would compound failures.

directives_for_next_cycle.directive: Implement stats_summary.json generation before next cycle
directives_for_next_cycle.rationale: Game-design changes proposed without performance baseline. Need metrics to validate balance adjustments.

directives_for_next_cycle.directive: Diagnose worker failure pattern — check logs, paths, permissions
directives_for_next_cycle.rationale: All 3 ERROR domains have vague blockers ('============' or empty string). Suggests systemic issue not task-specific.
investigation_steps: Review worker PowerShell scripts for error handling
Check if workers write detailed errors to logs before status JSON
Verify all worker dependencies (Godot exe, Python, npm, git)
Test each worker script in isolation with verbose output

directives_for_next_cycle.directive: Decide on game-design changes WITHOUT autoplay validation
directives_for_next_cycle.rationale: 3 balance changes proposed (LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN, AWEN_REGEN, POWER_MILESTONES) but no autoplay data to validate. Apply speculatively OR wait for infrastructure?
options: Apply changes speculatively based on theoretical analysis (game-design review is rigorous)
Wait for autoplay infrastructure + stats baseline before applying
Apply CHANGE_1 (CRITICAL priority) only, defer others

directives_for_next_cycle.directive: Celebrate small wins — test_results.json now operational
directives_for_next_cycle.rationale: INFRA-001 resolved. Validation pipeline now automated. This is progress despite domain failures.

conditional_proceed_criteria.description: IF human decides to PROCEED despite ESCALATE, these conditions MUST be met:
required: At least 1 of 3 ERROR domains diagnosed and fixed
Clear decision on game-design changes (apply or defer)
Worker error logging improved (no more vague blockers)
recommended: GUT framework installed (enables real test coverage)

positive: 2/5 domains (ui-ux, gameplay) delivered infrastructure tasks successfully
All 3 review agents delivered quality analysis despite missing data
negative: Blockers are uninformative (separator lines or empty strings)
No progress on stats infrastructure (INFRA-002 from Cycle 1)
Regression in completion rate: Cycle 1 = 100%, Cycle 2 = 40%
systemic_concerns: Worker error handling may be swallowing exceptions
Domain status JSON may not reflect actual worker output
Pipeline may need better failure isolation (1 domain fail shouldn't block others)
